subcodes.first_line: O My servant! This is My Book sent unto thee, that thou mayest rejoice in My remembrance, be stirred by My fragrances, be gladdened by My verses, and arise from the horizon of My steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابی الی عبدی لیفرح بذکری و تهزه نفحاتی و تسره آیاتی و یطلع من افق استقامتی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for nearness to God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
